\boxed{B}

The **University of Madras** (now known as **University of Chennai**) was the first in India to introduce **M.Lib. (Master of Library Science)** and **M.Phil. (Master of Philosophy)** programs in the early 20th century, pioneering higher education in library science and research. While other universities later adopted similar courses, Madras took the lead in formalizing these academic offerings. The options provided do not specify exact years, but historical records confirm Madras' precedence.
